rounds: Lavendra with the necklace, black bag, and Noskin loafers? He got that one — full picture, people who know him, zero armour. Pink toes held all week and the thong at Balmoral was an active choice, not an accident. But the poncho at Balmoral is doing double duty — brave choice, no exposure. And the wetsuit moment? Caught himself wanting to hide his toes from the swim group. Named it, but the joy police definitely showed up.
pattern: They're quiet with strangers, loud with his people — and they've been hiding inside his routines so long he stopped noticing them.
focus: Look at one daily routine this week and ask — is this what I'd choose, or just what I do?
